name: Maral Overseas Limited
summary: Maral Overseas Limited manufactures and sells cotton yarns, knitted fabrics, and garments in India and internationally. It operates in three segments: Yarn, Fabric, and Textile Made-Ups. The company's products comprise cotton combed Ecru and dyed yarns; and special yarns, including bamboo/cotton, modal/cotton, soya/cotton, organic cotton, fairtrade certified cotton, long staple cotton/pima cotton, slub, core spun lycra, compact, contamination free, reverse and zero twist, recycled cotton, and zero twist yarns used in various applications, such as circular and socks knitting, flat knits, towel weaving, denim and bottom weight fabrics, yarn dyeing, and sweaters. It also offers fabrics in various knits, such as single jersey, rib, interlock, piquet, fleece, French rib, pointelle, and autostriper/engineered stripe products; special fibers and yarns comprising bamboo and blends, soya and blends, organic cotton, fairtrade certified cotton, polyester, slub fabric, modal and blends, and tencel and blends; and special finishes. In addition, the company provides a range of garments consisting of active wear, casual wear, and sleep wear for men and ladies; and fairtrade garments and soft toys for infants and kids. Its knitted products include T-shirts, polo shirts, rugby shirts, henley shirts, hooded shirts, jackets, sweatshirts, tank tops, camisoles, shorts, pyjamas, joggers, etc. for men and ladies. The company markets its products in the United States, Canada, Europe, Japan, Hong Kong, the Middle East, South Africa, and other countries. Maral Overseas Limited was incorporated in 1989 and is based in Noida, India.
